initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Player_Attributes.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player
JOIN Player_Attributes ON Player.player_api_id = Player_Attributes.player_api_id
WHERE Player.birthday BETWEEN '1987-01-01' AND '1992-12-31';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Player_Attributes.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player
JOIN Player_Attributes ON Player.player_api_id = Player_Attributes.player_api_id
WHERE Player.birthday BETWEEN '1987-01-01' AND '1992-12-31';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Player_Attributes.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player
JOIN Player_Attributes ON Player.player_api_id = Player_Attributes.player_api_id
WHERE Player.birthday BETWEEN '1987-01-01' AND '1992-12-31';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Player_Attributes.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_left_foot
FROM Player
JOIN Player_Attributes ON Player.player_api_id = Player_Attributes.player_api_id
WHERE Player.birthday BETWEEN '1987-01-01' AND '1992-12-31';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Player_Attributes.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player
JOIN Player_Attributes ON Player.player_api_id = Player_Attributes.player_api_id
WHERE Player.birthday BETWEEN '1987-01-01' AND '1992-12-31';
